scope: Tier-2 auth-hook migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (jobs, report_types, reports); legacy youtube-analytics is read-only (Write always returns ErrUnsupportedOperation) and the full YouTube Reporting/Analytics API surface (job creation/deletion, bulk report media download, the separate Analytics querying API) is out of scope until Pass B

bulk report CSV/GZIP bytes are not a syncable record stream
